name: Dummy UCP Merchant Agent
description: An A2A-compatible dummy UCP merchant agent with deterministic local catalog search. The listed UCP merchant skills are executable through JSON-RPC message/send and mapped to local UCP-style merchant actions.

skills.name: Search Catalog
skills.description: Search the merchant catalog and return matching products in a strict JSON schema.
examples: Search for black cotton t-shirts in size medium
Show available wireless headphones with noise cancellation

skills.name: Get Product Details
skills.description: Return authoritative product, variant, price, inventory, policy, and fulfillment details in a strict JSON schema.
examples: Get variant details for product prod_123 and variant var_blue_m
Return policy, fulfillment, and trust evidence for product prod_123
